programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: Sizwe Biko, an ordinary man with extraordinary skills as a martial artist. He wants nothing more than to live a simple life, but is thrust into a fight for his father's freedom, a leftover casualty of South Africa's former Apartheid mandates.

programme.title: It's Fixer upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers (Louise Dylan and Sean Wing) find themselves in financial jeopardy, they turn to Dan's parents' (Dee Wallace and Gary Neal Johnson) for help. His father thinks it is time for his son to learn some life lessons.

programme.title: Always And Forever
programme.desc: After a tragedy reunites Nicole with her childhood friends, they each find themselves in danger, targets of a deranged stalker. Nicole knows this can't be a coincidence. The secrets of their past are coming back to haunt them.

programme.title: Ouija House
programme.desc: A girl takes her friends to a house with a dark past for a research project. They unwittingly summon an evil entity with plans of its own who makes the house part of its sinister game.

programme.title: Ed Sheeran: Man + Guitar
programme.desc: Ed Sheeran went from homeless, to being in the homes of millions.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: As the day of his predicted death approaches, a deeply depressed J.T. seems resigned to his fate.

programme.title: Ed Sheeran: Man + Guitar
programme.desc: Ed Sheeran went from homeless, to being in the homes of millions.

programme.title: 5ive Days to Midnight
programme.desc: As the day of his predicted death approaches, a deeply depressed J.T. seems resigned to his fate.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Omkara
programme.desc: A crime drama based on William Shakespeare's play "Othello". The film follows Omkara, a powerful and feared gangster who trusts his lieutenant , Langda more than anyone. However, Langda plots against Omkara, manipulating him into believing his wife has been unfaithful. The film explores themes of jealousy, betrayal, and revenge, and features powerful performances and intense action sequences.

programme.title: Ragini MMS
programme.desc: A horror film that follows the story of a couple, who visit a secluded farmhouse for a weekend getaway. However, their vacation turns into a nightmare when they realize they are not alone and their intimate moments are being recorded. The movie features suspenseful thrills and explores themes of voyeurism and supernatural terror in a unsettling plot.

programme.title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
programme.desc: Bharat, a small-time artist, finds himself dealing with the effects of a corrupt system. In the process, he himself discovers his ideals and decides to fight for the rights of the common people.

programme.title: Dost
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

programme.title: Taqdeer Ka Tamasha
programme.desc: An officer encounters his estranged brother while on a mission to nab a goon.

programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: Two con artist compete with each other in order to establish superiority.

programme.desc: Rahul is torn between his desire for a successful career and his love for Seema.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Do Chutki Sindoor
programme.desc: Vinayak and Siddhi live in Agra and Siddhi has a sister named Maya, who has a mental capacity of a 9-year-old. Siddhi takes full responsibility of Maya and ensures she is never left alone. Sunaina, their stepmother worries about Maya. Siddhi assures Sunaina that she will not marry until she finds someone who will take care of Maya. On the other hand, Vinayak who is the only son of rich and famous Jayadevi, a shrewd woman who despises the colour black. Vinayak and Siddhi's paths cross when Maya is about to get hit by Vinayak's car. Siddhi intervenes and saves Maya, but in anger slaps Vinayak for calling Maya "Pagal" (crazy). Vinayak realizes that he has fallen for Siddhi and promises to take care of Maya and marries Siddhi to seek revenge and make Maya suffer.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

To clear the confusion, they seek help from Cuddle Power to learn how to read an analog watch. Through a magical journey, they discover the functioning of the hour and minute hands and successfully read the correct time.

programme.title: Opening an umbrella
programme.desc: The cubbies get caught in the rain but struggle to open their umbrellas. Using their cuddle power, they embark on a magical tutorial to learn the correct steps. They succeed in turning a rainy day into a joyous adventure.

programme.title: Krate Kid
programme.desc: Jerry's uncontrollable sneezing leads to a playful chase around the room. Jane tries to administer cough syrup to him but fails until she cleverly puts on a doctor's attire and successfully treats him. However, their roles reverse when Jerry attempts to administer cough syrup to Jane, resulting in a comical chase and Jane's injury. Jerry then applies ointment to her injured leg, and they playfully continue their doctor and patient routine with their toys.

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Jerry's new pet
programme.desc: Jerry is playing in the park when he finds a small dog. He pets the dog and decidesto bring him home. However, Jerry knows that Jane is allergic to dogs and won'tallow him to keep the dog

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Mr. Armstrong is scheduled for a chess match with the champion Natasha Badinski, who's secretly planning a heist.

programme.title: Missed Them by a Hare/Drone Zone
programme.desc: Wildflowers are being destroyed, causing tomato worms to devour the crops on a nearby farm the Rangers need to help bats from colliding with wind turbines.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Monster Smash
programme.desc: When JD and Kent believe that the dreaded Whomper is lurking outside the lab, Kent is terrified. JD hopes to become famous for discovering an unknown creature. The team must use science to determine if it's really a monster or some other animal.

programme.title: Flying a kite
programme.desc: The adorable cubbies want to fly kites but struggle to launch their kites in the sky. With the power of cuddles, they embark on a magical adventure, learning the art of kite flying and discovering the str_hinth of their friendship.

programme.title: Great Bouncing Eyeballs
programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.title: The Seagull Heist
programme.desc: Jane and jerry see the seagull perched on a tree with a nest full of their belongings. They try to climb up thetree to retrieve their t_hings, but the seagull fiercely defends its nest and make Jane and Jerry tobackoff

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: When Captain Fantastic is inducted into the Super Hero Hall of Fame, Nigel Danforth decides to do everyt_hing he can to disrupt the main event.

programme.title: If The Fossil Fits
programme.desc: The kids of the Secret Lab have the change to learn about prehistoric times.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S2 Ep 21
programme.desc: Boonie Cubs Season 2 is a bran-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. It follows young Vick, who finds a magical portal in a tree and finds a wonderful world where he attends Pine Tree Kindergarten with young Briar, young Bramble, and other kids where he learns in fun and exciting ways. Here they will learn how to get along with others, explore the wonders of nature and science while cultivating a zest for life.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S2 Ep 22

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure Ep 01
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Adventure Ep 02
programme.desc: This series follows Vick, Briar and Bramble on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 21
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 22
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 25
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 26
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 21
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 22
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. programme.title: Fury Spinner Ep 01 Part A
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Snakehammer of all people, the ingenious goblin inventor, loses his memory by a stupid accident. When he wakes up from his unconsciousness, he finds himself among the trolls.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Lord Kann, the evil ruler of the goblins, is terminally ill. Daiman and Balabust know only one way out: they kidnap Fala, the healer of the elves, to cure Kann.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: The goblins go on the attack. The elves are desperate. Colonel Daiman, plagued by a guilty conscience, comes to their aid at the last second.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: The elves of the Midlands are in great danger. The leader of the goblins, the power-hungry Lord Kann, wants to conquer their glorious realm. Phaedon, a traitorous member of the elven council, is playing an evil game.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Scorch has stolen all the Boom Carts and peace between the planets is in jeopardy! The Da Boom crew must now do everything in their power to restore peace.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The crew only have one more mission to complete before peace is restored between the planets and they can finish off the villain Scorch. But that's not so easy.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The crew sets off in search of the legendary Omazaza. But the hour of darkness is near! Hedlok and his sister Etra are planning something evil - they want to finish off the Da Boom Crew!

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: On the planet Tidacia, the Da Boom crew have to find the next Boom Cart. But Scorch attacks the crew with his best killer, the Red Corsair.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The crew has been sent to check out the mysterious Xytari Quadrant. A bunch of aliens are missing there. It's like the Bermuda Triangle in space. What awaits the Da Boom crew there?

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The kids accidentally make a hole in the dome of the village of Pacifica. The dome was supposed to protect the village from the cold. Now the crew must do everything they can to repair the damage.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The crew lands on a planet because of heavy fog. When the fog clears, they discover that they are back on Earth and standing right in front of their old orphanage. Is this a coincidence?

programme.title: MAGIC TUNNELS

programme.sub-title: Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Hosts Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite petrol heads from the Middle East to bring their tuned cars to the 'The Walk' at Jumeirah Beach and have it rated in the categories speed, style and sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a one night stay for two people at this glamorous Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. On this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro and Mercedes SLS AMG try to impress.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: If you want to see out-of-this-world, customized or tuned luxury vehicles or posh cars you need to go to 'The Walk', the glamorous boulevard of Jumeirah Beach. Among the presented cars are a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: People from the Middle East are crazy about their cars. On Put Your Car on TV they have the chance to present their tuned vehicles and judged. programme.desc: Competitors forge a Nepalese kukri, a 100-year-old barong and a hand-forged falcata.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Umeed India
programme.desc: If you'd imagine an ace cricketer to host a television show, you can be sure it will be a sports related series. And, Umeed India makes a compelling case. For the first time, versatile cricketer Virender Sehwag will host a television show. Umeed India will showcase groundbreaking stories of diversified, intrepid athletes aiming for glory at Olympics 2020. For the 13-part series, Virender reinstates the fact that Olympic stars never ‘just' appear at the Games. Their stories start in small villages, where they train every day – with one aim in mind – bringing home that Gold. Watch Virender travel to their training bases, chronicling exciting moments in the home environment besides interviewing the athletes' families and coaching staff. The episodes feature inspiring stories of OP Karhana, Suyash Yadav, Avtar Singh and Dutee Chand along with Sakshi Malik, Vinesh Poghat among many other Olympians. Can we find the 2020 medalists for India in 2017?

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Andrea Schlake volunteers at an animal sanctuary when a chimpanzee escapes its enclosure and chases her down a great white shark knocks surfer Todd Endris off his board and attacks him.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R.
programme.desc: Ivan Carter exposes the secret war in Africa, a war of greed that's putting the rhino in danger.

programme.title: Alien Sharks Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A showcase of unusual sharks with the most unbelievable adaptations and unique mutations, from the dark, frigid waters of the Arctic to the boiling, volcanic cauldrons of the Pacific a search for the cookiecutter shark and the lantern shark.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.sub-title: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off its mother's milk the bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick a squirrel monkey visits the dentist.

programme.title: Meet the Orangutans: Climbing And Nest-Building

programme.title: The Wine Guys: Grape Escapes

programme.title: Word Travels
programme.sub-title: the Truth Behind the Byline - New Zealand
programme.desc: It's the adrenaline capital of the world, so Robin swoops and sledges his way to a double page spread. Julia explores the geo-thermal wonderland of Rotorua through the up-and-coming hobby of geo-caching. Fun and games aside, both consider how a life on the road impacts personal relationships, and how to keep a stable head when your world is constantly changing.

programme.title: Word Travels
programme.sub-title: the Truth Behind the Byline - Sri Lanka: Steeped in Serendipity
programme.desc: Finding a good travel story often involves the help of serendipity, a word itself derived from the old name for Sri Lanka. programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Episode 10 takes Duncan to visit the Ancient city of Sukhothai where he cooks a traditional river fish, fried rice in front of this magnificent 800 year old backdrop.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Lindsay has outgrown her childhood bedroom and is ready to leave her hand-me-down furniture and kiddy colours in the past. Lindsay, like every teenager, needs a room for the three S's: sleeping, studying and socializing! Designer Samantha Pynn steps in to create a space that is functional, eco-fabulous and can grow with her -- proving that a youthful look can be achieved without looking childish.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Jonathan and Kerry are in the market for a new home to share memories in with their family with a budget of 12 million dollars, Real Estate Agent Tav Schembri is challenged to find the family their dream home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Nathan, a start up company owner and his fiance Kelsey, a owner of a holistic nutrition company, are open to purchasing a house anywhere in the GTA.

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Off-the-grid adventures at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from a spooky mansion outside of Yellowstone National Park to a UFO watchtower in Great Sand Dunes National Park.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine's wild beauty. It's where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It's known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you'll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here's why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Diners Drive Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Brooklyn, Guy Fieri finds a barbecue joint is mashin' up a variety of styles for their unique wings and their big time beef ribs. And in NC, a husband and wife tag-team in the kitchen to deliver soft shell crab quesadilla.

programme.title: Just Landed
programme.desc: Jim kicks off his journey in Virginia Beach, a coastal gem with a deep-rooted fishing heritage. But Mother Nature has her own plans—as storm clouds roll in, Jim has a challenge ahead: tagging his first Redfish for NOAA to help track its migration.

programme.title: Venturing Out: St. Croix
programme.desc: Creighton is joined by recently retired Navy sailor Tanner to try their hand at deep sea fishing, both above and below the crystal clear waves.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain loves the energy and edge of big cities.

programme.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet
programme.desc: The Ewing family give back to Kodiak Veterans by serving them a five star gourmet meal in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Alaskas Wild Gourmet
programme.desc: Surfers hire the Ewings to cater dinner on a secluded beach in Kodiak, but hurricane force winds could mean disaster.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Welcome to a legendary Ocean destination. With over 300 years of history and miles of coastal beauty, Newport, Rhode Island was once the vacation hotspot for the who's who of the Gilded Age. Today, it's still a vacation favorite with stunning architecture, rich history, and an incredible gastronomy scene. Join Samantha as she meets the people past and present who make Newport a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Known for thousands of miles of coastline, Florida's sugar-fine sand beaches and sunshine attract over 110 million visitors annually. But in the quest for the ultimate beach vacation, it's important not to overlook what was here before. From wildlife to indigenous peoples, there's so much more to Southwest Florida than meets the eye. And while there's a lot of history here, the Sunshine State's future is looking as bright as ever. It's easy to see why Florida's Paradise Coast is a place to love.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America's most legendary outdoor playgrounds.
